writing_samples.text: Early one spring morning, Pink Bear wakes with a goal to setup the perfect Easter Egg Hunt for his best friend Susie. He quietly climbs down from her bed, swinging on the knobs of her bedside table, and avoiding the loose bracelet beads scattered underfoot. He waddles over towards the window, pulling himself up to peer through the blind that is pulled tight. His mouth drops open as he peers outside and the moonlight reflects off the fresh blanket of snow laying on the ground outside. He realizes
writing_samples.suggested_focus: Focus on developing Pink Bear's unique character voice through dialogue or internal thoughts to make him more distinct.
